UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user preferences and basic information.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

defaultColor.description: The user's preferred default QR code color.

QRCodeConfig.title: QR Code Configuration
QRCodeConfig.description: Stores a saved QR code configuration.

id.description: The unique ID of the QR code.

name.description: A friendly name for the saved QR code.

data.description: The content of the QR code.

config.description: The full configuration object for qr-code-styling.

createdAt.description: When the QR code was saved.

/users/{userId}/qr_history/{qrId}.description: History of saved QR codes for each user.
